site.tagline: Rapid City Radon Experts — Protect Your Family from SD's #1 Indoor Hazard

seo.meta_title: Radon Mitigation in Rapid City, SD | Rapid City Radon Mitigation
seo.meta_description: Professional radon mitigation in Rapid City, SD. Licensed & insured. Free estimates. Call (605) 640-5642.

faqs.q: How bad is radon in Rapid City and South Dakota?
faqs.a: South Dakota has the highest average indoor radon levels in the US. Rapid City and Pennington County consistently test above the EPA action level of 4 pCi/L. The state average is over 9 pCi/L. Testing and mitigation are strongly recommended for all homes.

faqs.q: How much does radon mitigation cost in Rapid City?
faqs.a: Radon mitigation in Rapid City typically costs $800–$1,400 for a standard system. Cost depends on foundation type and radon concentration. We include follow-up testing to confirm results.

faqs.q: How quickly can you install a radon mitigation system?
faqs.a: Most installations are completed in a single day — typically 4–6 hours. Your home is safe to use immediately after. Post-mitigation testing is done 24–48 hours later.

faqs.q: Do you serve Sturgis, Spearfish, and Belle Fourche?
faqs.a: Yes — we serve all of the Black Hills region including Rapid City, Box Elder, Summerset, Black Hawk, Sturgis, Spearfish, Belle Fourche, and into the surrounding counties.

faqs.q: Is South Dakota radon testing required for home sales?
faqs.a: South Dakota does not legally require radon testing for home sales, but most buyers request it. We provide certified pre-sale testing and fast turnaround. Mitigation before listing often increases sale price.
